title: Calcearia compta
taxonomy: Calcearia compta is a genus of small to medium-sized, free-living foraminiferans. The classification of Calcearia compta places it within the larger family Calcarinidae. This family is further grouped within the order Rotaliida and the class Foraminifera. The class Foraminifera belongs to the phylum Sarcomastigophora, and the phylum Sarcomastigophora is part of the kingdom Protista. Calcearia compta is a type of single-celled organism that is commonly found in marine environments.
benefits: Unfortunately, I was unable to find sufficient information about the specific plant Calcearia compta.
